@startuml
!theme plain
class "Driver" as Driver {
  - listOfCities : String[]
  - listOfNames : String[]
  - listOfColours : String[]
  + main()
  + debug_main()
  - debug_constructorAndToString()
  - debug_equals()
  - debug_randomObjects()
  - debug_copyConstructor()
  + fillArrayPublicTransport()
  + fillArrayPublicTransport()
  + printingArrayObjects()
  + traceSearchLeastAndMostExpensive()
  + getRandomInt()
  + getRandomPrice()
  + getRandomYear()
  + getRandomPublicTransport()
  + getRandomAircraft()
  + getRandomFerry()
  + getRandomCityBus()
  - getLineName()
  + getRandomTram()
  + getRandomMetro()
}

Driver << C >>

@enduml
